attributes.action: Bring down the cost of fuel
attributes.additional_details: Because it is in the best interest for the United Kingdom as everyone is suffering financially due to a war that we are not even involved in.
attributes.background: Bring down the cost of fuel, it’s getting ridiculously expensive and many people just can’t afford it.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674

Remove the VAT element of tax from the cost of fuel at the pump
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764916
